use_cases: Hero section with large typography that responds to mouse position across quadrants
Landing page text with dynamic shadow effect following cursor movement
Creative portfolio showcase with interactive depth illusion
SaaS landing page with engaging mouse-reactive visual element
Portfolio or personal site hero with immersive text shadow interaction
ai_summary: An interactive hero component featuring large typography with a mouse-tracking shadow effect. The text shadow dynamically follows the mouse position across four quadrants relative to the element, creating an illusion of 3D depth. The shadow intensity and color hue are fully customizable via props, making it ideal for creating engaging landing page hero sections that respond to user mouse movement with visually striking shadow effects.
